title: File
subtitle: A handle to a file on disk. Supports reading, writing, seeking, and metadata queries.

members.name: appendToContents
members.description: Appends to the contents of the file with aSeq. Returns self.

members.name: asBuffer
members.description:
Opens the receiver in read only mode, reads the whole
    contents of the file into a buffer object, closes the file and returns the
    buffer.

members.name: at
members.description:
Returns a Number containing the byte at the specified
    byte index or Nil if the index is out of bounds.

members.name: atPut
members.description:
Writes the byte value of byteNumber to the file position
    positionNumber. Returns self.

members.name: baseName
members.description: Returns File's name without an extension (returned Sequence consists of all characters up to final period ["."] character).

members.name: close
members.description:
Closes the receiver if open, otherwise does nothing. Returns self.

    When the file was opened via popen, sets either exitStatus or
    termSignal to the exit status on normal exit, or the signal causing
    abnormal termination.

members.name: containingDirectory
members.description: Deprecated. See parentDirectory.

members.name: contents
members.description: Returns contents of the file as a mutable Sequence of bytes.

members.name: copyToPath
members.description: Copies the file to the specified path.

members.name: copyToPathWithoutYielding
members.description: Copies the file to the specified path without yielding.

members.name: create
members.description: Creates an empty file at the file's path. Returns self on success, nil on failure.

members.name: descriptor
members.description: Returns the file's descriptor as a number.

members.name: exists
members.description:
Returns true if the file path exists, and false otherwise.
    If optionalPath string is provided, it tests the existance of that path
    instead.

members.name: exitStatus
members.description: System's close status (after file close).

members.name: flush
members.description: Forces any buffered data to be written to disk. Returns self.

members.name: foreach
members.description:
For each byte, set index to the index of the byte and value to the number containing the byte value and execute aMessage. Example usage: 

aFile foreach(i, v, writeln("byte at ", i, " is ", v))
aFile foreach(v, writeln("byte ", v))

members.name: foreachLine
members.description:
For each line, set index to the line number of the line and line and execute aMessage. Example usage: 
aFile foreachLine(i, v, writeln("Line ", i, ": ", v))
aFile foreach(v, writeln("Line: ", v))

members.name: groupId
members.description: Returns a Number containing the group id associated with the file's path.

members.name: isAtEnd
members.description: Returns true if the file is at its end. Otherwise returns false.

members.name: isDirectory
members.description: Returns true if the receiver's path points to a directory, false otherwise.

members.name: isLink
members.description: Returns true if the receiver's path points to a link, false otherwise.

members.name: isOpen
members.description: Returns self if the file is open. Otherwise returns Nil.

members.name: isPipe
members.description: Returns true if the receiver is a pipe, false otherwise.

members.name: isRegularFile
members.description:
Returns true if the receiver's file descriptor is a regular file, false
    otherwise.

members.name: isSocket
members.description: Returns true if the receiver's file descriptor is a Socket, false otherwise.

members.name: isUserExecutable
members.description: Returns true if the receiver is user group executable, false otherwise.

members.name: lastAccessDate
members.description:
Returns a Date object containing the last date and
    time the file was accessed.

members.name: lastDataChangeDate
members.description:
Returns a Date object containing the last date and
    time the file's contents were changed.

members.name: lastInfoChangeDate
members.description:
Returns a Date object containing the last date and
    time the file's meta info was changed.

members.name: lock
members.description: Creates a path.lock file if it does not exist. If it does exist, it waits for it be removed by the process that created it first. Returns self.

members.name: lockFile
members.description: Deprecated. The .lock file used for File locking.

members.name: makeFullyBuffered
members.description: Sets the file's stream to be fully

members.name: makeLineBuffered
members.description: Sets the file's stream to be line buffered.

members.name: makeUnbuffered
members.description: Sets the file's stream to be unbuffered.

members.name: mode
members.description: Returns the open mode of the file(either read, update or append).

members.name: moveTo
members.description:
Moves the file specified by the receiver's path to the
    new path pathString. If a file already exists at pathString,
    it is silently overwritten. Raises a File error exception if
    the rename fails.

members.name: name
members.description: Returns the last path component of the file path.

members.name: open
members.description:
Opens the file. Creates one if it does not exist.
    If the optionalPathString argument is provided, the path is set to it before
    opening. Returns self or raises an File exception on error.

members.name: openForAppending
members.description:
Sets the file mode to append (writing to the end of the file)
    and calls open(optionalPathString).

members.name: openForReading
members.description:
Sets the file mode to read (reading only) and calls
    open(optionalPathString).

members.name: openForUpdating
members.description:
Sets the file mode to update (reading and writing) and calls
    open(optionalPathString). This will not delete the file if it already
    exists. Use the remove method first if you need to delete an existing file
    before opening a new one.

members.name: parentDirectory
members.description: Returns a File for the directory that is the parent directory of this object's path.

members.name: path
members.description: Returns the file path of the receiver.

members.name: popen
members.description:
Open the file as a pipe. Return self.

    Closing a popen'ed file sets exitStatus or termSignal
    to reflect the status or cause of the child processes' termination.

members.name: position
members.description: Returns the current file pointer byte position as a Number.

members.name: positionAtEnd
members.description: Sets the file position pointer to the end of the file.

members.name: protectionMode
members.description:
Returns a Number containing the protection mode
    associated with the file's path.

members.name: readBufferOfLength
members.description:
Reads a Buffer of the specified length and returns it.
    Returns Nil if the end of the file has been reached.

members.name: readLine
members.description:
Reads the next line of the file and returns it as a
    string without the return character. Returns Nil if the
    end of the file has been reached.

members.name: readLines
members.description: Returns list containing all lines in the file.

members.name: readStringOfLength
members.description:
Reads a String of the specified length and returns it.
    Returns Nil if the end of the file has been reached.

members.name: readToBufferLength
members.description:
Reads at most aNumber number of items and appends them to aBuffer.
    Returns number of items read.

members.name: readToEnd
members.description: Reads chunkSize bytes (4096 by default) at a time until end of file is reached.  Returns a sequence containing the bytes read from the file.

members.name: remove
members.description:
Removes the file specified by the receiver's path.
    Raises an error if the file exists but is not removed. Returns self.

members.name: reopen
members.description:
Reopens otherFile and redirects its stream to this file's path using mode.
    If mode is omitted, it is copied from otherFile.
    Returns self or raises a File exception on error.

members.name: rewind
members.description: Sets the file position pointer to the beginning of the file.

members.name: setContents
members.description: Replaces the contents for the file with aSeq. Returns self.

members.name: setPath
members.description:
Sets the file path of the receiver to pathString.
    The default path is an empty string. Returns self.

members.name: setPosition
members.description:
Sets the file position pointer to the byte specified by aNumber. Returns
    self.

members.name: setStreamDestination
members.description: Set the buffer to be used for future stream operations.

members.name: size
members.description: Returns the file size in bytes.

members.name: standardError
members.description: Returns a new File whose stream is set to the standard error stream.

members.name: standardInput
members.description: Returns a new File whose stream is set to the standard input stream.

members.name: standardOutput
members.description: Returns a new File whose stream is set to the standard output stream.

members.name: startStreaming
members.description: Begin streamed read to stream destination set by setStreamDestination(aBuffer).

members.name: stat
members.description: Updates the receiver's meta info cache.

members.name: statSize
members.description: Returns the file's size in bytes as a Number.

members.name: streamDestination
members.description: The buffer object to be used for future stream operations.

members.name: streamReadSize
members.description: Size of stream buffer used for streaming operations

members.name: streamTo
members.description: Perform streamed reading to given buffer. The buffer will be appended with chunks of size streamReadSize until EOF. The final chunk may be less than streamReadSize.

members.name: streamToWithoutYielding
members.description: Perform streamed reading to given buffer without yielding between reads.

members.name: temporaryFile
members.description:
Returns a new File object with an open temporary file. The file is
    automatically deleted when the returned File object is closed or garbage
    collected.

members.name: termSignal
members.description: Pipe's terminating signal (after file close opened via popen).

members.name: thisSourceFile
members.description: Returns a File representing the system file in which this Io code exists.

members.name: truncateToSize
members.description: Truncates the file's size to the numberOfBytes. Returns self.

members.name: userId
members.description: Returns a Number containing the user id associated with the file's path.

members.name: with
members.description: Returns a new instance with the provided path.

members.name: write
members.description: Writes the arguments to the receiver file. Returns self.
